attributes.name: Aliases
attributes.description: Other names the organization is known by.

attributes.name: Aliases
attributes.description: Other names the species or race is known by.

attributes.name: Aliases
attributes.description: Other names or titles the item is known by.

attributes.name: Aliases
attributes.description: Other names the power/system is known by.

attributes.name: Aliases
attributes.description: Other names, titles, epithets, or nicknames the character is known by.

attributes.name: Aliases
attributes.description: Other names the place is known by.

attributes.name: Arc Type
attributes.description: The kind of arc (redemption, revenge, coming-of-age, mystery, …).

attributes.name: Category
attributes.description: The category of trope (character, plot, romance, setting, …).

attributes.name: Category
attributes.description: The category the term belongs to (magic, politics, technology, …).

attributes.name: Era
attributes.description: The time period or era of the setting.

attributes.name: Parties
attributes.description: The characters or groups in the relationship.

attributes.name: Type
attributes.description: The kind of event (battle, betrayal, wedding, death, revelation, …).

attributes.name: Date in Story
attributes.description: When the event occurs in the story's timeline (in-world date or chapter).

attributes.name: Definition
attributes.description: What the term means in this story's world.

attributes.name: Definition
attributes.description: What the trope is.

attributes.name: Gender
attributes.description: The character's gender or how the text presents it.

attributes.name: Location
attributes.description: The place or region the social setting covers.

attributes.name: Parties
attributes.description: The characters or groups the arc centers on.

attributes.name: Relationship Type
attributes.description: The kind of relationship (rivals, lovers, family, allies, …).

attributes.name: Traits
attributes.description: Defining physical or innate traits of the species.

attributes.name: Type
attributes.description: The kind of item (weapon, artifact, relic, document, tool, …).

attributes.name: Type
attributes.description: The kind of place (city, castle, region, realm, building, …).

attributes.name: Type
attributes.description: The kind of power system (magic, cultivation, technology, psionics, …).

attributes.name: Type
attributes.description: The kind of organization (guild, house, cult, government, army, …).

attributes.name: Abilities
attributes.description: Special abilities or powers the species possesses.

attributes.name: Class Hierarchy
attributes.description: The social classes or hierarchy and how they relate.

attributes.name: How Manifested
attributes.description: How this trope shows up in the story specifically.

attributes.name: Leader
attributes.description: Who leads or heads the organization.

attributes.name: Location
attributes.description: Where the event takes place.

attributes.name: Owner
attributes.description: Who currently holds or is associated with the item.

attributes.name: Parent Location
attributes.description: The larger place this one belongs to (region, country, world).

attributes.name: Rank / Tier
attributes.description: The tier, rank, or level scheme within the system.

attributes.name: Role
attributes.description: The character's narrative role (protagonist, antagonist, mentor, foil, …).

attributes.name: Status
attributes.description: The current state of the relationship (estranged, growing, broken, …).

attributes.name: Trigger
attributes.description: The event or condition that sets the arc in motion.

attributes.name: Usage Note
attributes.description: How and when the term is used, and any nuance.

attributes.name: Atmosphere
attributes.description: The mood, tone, or sensory feel of the place as the text describes it.

attributes.name: Habitat
attributes.description: Where the species lives.

attributes.name: Headquarters
attributes.description: The organization's base, seat, or primary location.

attributes.name: Occupation
attributes.description: The character's job, profession, or primary activity in the story.

attributes.name: Participants
attributes.description: The characters or groups involved in the event.

attributes.name: Rules & Norms
attributes.description: The customs, laws, and social norms that govern behavior.

attributes.name: Stakes
attributes.description: What is at risk or to be gained in the arc.

attributes.name: Subverted?
attributes.description: Whether and how the story subverts or plays against the trope.

attributes.name: Symbolic Meaning
attributes.description: What the item represents thematically or symbolically in the story.

attributes.name: Tropes
attributes.description: Romance/relationship tropes that characterize it (if any).

attributes.name: User
attributes.description: Who wields or has access to this power.

attributes.name: Chapters Span
attributes.description: The chapter range the arc covers.

attributes.name: Culture
attributes.description: The species' culture, customs, or social organization.

attributes.name: Description
attributes.description: What the item is, its properties, and its role.

attributes.name: Dynamic
attributes.description: How the parties interact and the push-pull between them.

attributes.name: Effects
attributes.description: What the power does and its capabilities or limits.

attributes.name: Emotional Impact
attributes.description: The emotional weight or fallout the event carries for those involved.

attributes.name: Members
attributes.description: Notable members or the makeup of the organization.

attributes.name: Related Characters
attributes.description: Characters who embody or are involved with the trope.

attributes.name: Romance Obstacles
attributes.description: Social barriers to romance the setting imposes (if relevant).

attributes.name: Significance
attributes.description: Why the place matters to the story or its characters.

attributes.name: Social Class
attributes.description: The character's social standing or rank (noble, commoner, outcast, …).

attributes.name: Affiliation
attributes.description: The faction, house, organization, or side the character belongs to.

attributes.name: Description
attributes.description: How the power system works, concisely.

attributes.name: Description
attributes.description: What the organization is, its purpose, and its role in the story.

attributes.name: Description
attributes.description: What the place is and its notable features.

attributes.name: Description
attributes.description: What the species is, concisely.

attributes.name: Emotional Beats
attributes.description: The key emotional turning points along the arc.

attributes.name: Key Conflict
attributes.description: The central tension or obstacle in the relationship.

attributes.name: Outcome
attributes.description: What results or changes because of the event.

attributes.name: Significance
attributes.description: Why this social setting matters to the story.

attributes.name: Usage Note
attributes.description: Notes on how the trope functions in the story.

attributes.name: Appearance
attributes.description: Physical appearance: build, face, clothing, and any distinguishing or supernatural features described in the text.

attributes.name: Description
attributes.description: What happens in the event, concisely.

attributes.name: Description
attributes.description: A concise overview of the social setting.

attributes.name: Resolution
attributes.description: How the arc concludes or is left.

attributes.name: Turning Points
attributes.description: Moments that shift the relationship.

attributes.name: Description
attributes.description: A concise summary of the arc.

attributes.name: Personality
attributes.description: Temperament, core traits, virtues and flaws as shown through actions and speech.

attributes.name: Resolution
attributes.description: How the relationship resolves or is left.

attributes.name: Description
attributes.description: A concise summary of the relationship.

attributes.name: Emotional Wound
attributes.description: The past hurt, loss, or trauma that drives the character's behavior.

attributes.name: Love Language
attributes.description: How the character expresses or receives affection (if relevant to the story).

attributes.name: Relationships
attributes.description: Key relationships to other characters and how they connect.

attributes.name: Description
attributes.description: A concise overview of who the character is and their significance in the story.
